description: User pauses on the income selection screen with the cursor over the 'I run my own business' option.
frame_description: The screen displays a question 'How do you earn your income?' with three selectable options.

description: The page navigates back from the income selection screen to the first name input screen.
frame_description: The UI transitions from the income question back to the 'One last thing, what's your first name?' screen.

description: User pauses on the name input screen, with the cursor lingering near the 'GET MY HOME LOAN MATCHES' button.
frame_description: The screen shows a text input field for the user's first name and a large purple action button.

description: User clicks on the 'Type your first name here' input field to activate it for text entry.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the input field, which then gains a blue focus border.

description: The mobile on-screen keyboard appears as the input field is focused.
frame_description: A standard iOS-style keyboard slides up from the bottom of the screen.

description: User pauses with the keyboard open, moving the cursor over the keyboard area without entering text yet.
frame_description: The keyboard remains visible at the bottom of the screen while the input field remains empty.
